title: Native Proteomics by Capillary Zone Electrophoresis-Mass Spectrometry.
author: Wang Q Wang Q Qi Z Moeller W Wysocki VH Sun L
content: S-EPMC11646347 PMC11646347 Native Proteomics by Capillary Zone Electrophoresis-Mass Spectrometry. Native proteomics measures endogenous proteoforms and protein complexes under a near physiological condition using native mass spectrometry (nMS) coupled with liquid-phase separations. Native
